item.title: TYBABot - Virtual Assistant for Justicia XXI Web
item.description:
TYBABot is a specialized virtual assistant for Colombia’s Justicia XXI Web (Tyba) system, developed with Streamlit and the OpenAI API. It provides guidance on electronic judicial management to officials and system operators.

Key Features

  • Document Management: Guidance on e-judicial documents and their handling in Tyba
  • Judicial Proceedings: Guide on registering and querying procedural actions
  • Petitions: Assistance in managing electronic petitions (memoriales)
  • Notifications: Guidance on the digital notification system
  • Electronic Signatures: Support for judicial electronic signature processes

Technologies Used

  • Backend: Python, OpenAI Assistants API v2
  • Frontend: Streamlit
  • AI: Language model with specialized knowledge base on Tyba
  • Deployment: Streamlit Cloud

Impact

TYBABot reduces the learning curve for judicial officials interacting with the Tyba system, providing contextualized responses based on the official system documentation and best practices for electronic judicial management.

This assistant was born from direct experience working with the Justicia XXI Web system in the Judicial Branch, identifying the most frequent difficulties officials face when adopting electronic document management tools.

item.title: TutelaBot - Fundamental Rights Assistant
item.description:
TutelaBot is a virtual assistant specialized in Colombian constitutional mechanisms for the protection of fundamental rights: the Accion de Tutela (constitutional protection action) and the Derecho de Peticion (right to petition).

Knowledge Base

  • Political Constitution of Colombia 1991: Relevant articles on fundamental rights
  • Decree 2591 of 1991: Regulation of the Accion de Tutela

Key Features

  • Tutela Guidance: Assistance on requirements, procedures, deadlines, and scope of the Accion de Tutela
  • Right to Petition: Support on how to exercise the right to petition before public and private entities
  • Legal Foundation: Responses grounded in current constitutional regulations
  • Accessible Language: Clear explanations for citizens without legal training
  • Conversational Interaction: Natural dialogue to resolve legal questions

Technologies Used

  • Backend: Python, OpenAI API
  • Frontend: Streamlit
  • AI: Language model with Colombian constitutional knowledge
  • Deployment: Streamlit Cloud

Impact

TutelaBot democratizes access to information about fundamental rights protection mechanisms, enabling any citizen to understand how to exercise their constitutional rights without the need for prior legal counsel.

This project stems from the conviction that technology can reduce the justice access gap by providing basic legal guidance on the most widely used mechanisms by Colombian citizens to protect their fundamental rights.
